top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says it's not too late to buy SpaceX — under one condition
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said it's not too late to buy SpaceX if investors view the company as a long-term bet on space exploration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How Kojima made a destination out of denim
top_signals.summary: In Okayama Prefecture, an old textile town has turned jeans into a source of craft, identity and tourism.
